params.label: Image to segment
params.tip: Select which image version to segment.

params.label: Output label name
params.tip: Name for the output label set. Labels are written to {task_dir}/labels/{name}.zarr.

params.label: Segmentation models
params.tip: Add one entry per model. Use 'base' + 'nuc' pair for nucleus-anchored segmentation.

params.label: Model
params.tip: Cellpose model to use.

params.label: Match as
params.tip: Role of this model's output. Use one 'base' and one 'nuc' for paired segmentation.

params.label: Cell channels
params.tip: Channels carrying the cell signal (e.g. membrane or cytoplasm marker). Multiple channels are merged via maximum before prediction.

params.label: Nucleus channels
params.tip: Channels carrying the nucleus signal (e.g. DAPI). Leave empty for cytoplasm-only segmentation.

params.label: Cell diameter (µm)
params.tip: Expected cell diameter in µm. Converted to pixels using the physical pixel size from OME metadata.

params.label: Normalise percentile
params.tip: Upper percentile for intensity normalisation. Lower values increase sensitivity but may saturate bright objects.

params.label: Z-stitch threshold
params.tip: Cellpose z-stitch threshold. Non-zero enables 2D-per-slice segmentation with inter-slice stitching. 0 = run 2D on each slice independently.

params.label: Intensity threshold
params.tip: Absolute intensity threshold; pixels below this value are set to 0 before normalisation (0 = off).

params.label: Median filter
params.tip: Median filter kernel size applied before normalisation (0 = off).

params.label: Gaussian filter (σ)
params.tip: Gaussian blur sigma applied before normalisation (0 = off).

params.label: Nuc-base match threshold
params.tip: IoU threshold for matching nucleus labels to base labels. Only used when both a 'base' and 'nuc' model are present.

params.label: Remove unmatched cells
params.tip: Remove base cells that have no matching nucleus (only with nuc+base pair).

params.label: Min cell size (px)
params.tip: Remove objects smaller than this many pixels (0 = off).

params.label: Max cell size (px)
params.tip: Remove objects larger than this many pixels (0 = off). Useful for rejecting debris or merged clusters.

params.label: Label expansion (px)
params.tip: Expand label boundaries outward by N pixels (0 = off).

params.label: Label erosion (px)
params.tip: Erode label boundaries inward by N pixels (0 = off).

params.label: Clear border cells
params.tip: Remove cells that touch the XY image border.

params.label: Clear Z-depth cells
params.tip: Remove cells that touch the first or last Z slice (3D images only). Equivalent to clearTouchingBorder but along the Z axis.

params.label: Seam stitch threshold
params.tip: IoU threshold for stitching cells split at tile boundaries. Labels on opposite sides of a seam with IoU >= this value are merged into one. 0 = simple max merge (no stitching).

params.label: Global normalisation
params.tip: Use the lowest-resolution level to compute global intensity percentiles. Ensures consistent normalisation across tiles and timepoints.

params.label: Use Dask
params.tip: Load image as a Dask array. Reduces peak RAM on very large images.
